results.title: Federal Reserve Officials Signal Patience on Rate Cuts Amid Persistent Inflation
results.snippet: Fed Governor Waller said the central bank needs more evidence that inflation is cooling before cutting rates. Markets now price in fewer cuts for 2026.

results.title: Bitcoin Rallies Past $95K as Institutional Inflows Accelerate
results.snippet: Bitcoin surged above $95,000 driven by record ETF inflows. Analysts remain divided on whether the $100K barrier will be broken this quarter.

results.title: Supreme Court Term Preview: Major Cases and Retirement Speculation
results.snippet: Legal analysts note that Justice Thomas, 77, and Justice Alito, 76, face renewed retirement speculation ahead of the 2026 term.

results.title: March Jobs Report Shows Cooling Labor Market
results.snippet: The economy added 145,000 jobs in March, below expectations of 200,000. Unemployment ticked up to 4.1%.

results.title: Crypto Regulation Bill Advances in Senate Committee
results.snippet: The bipartisan crypto market structure bill cleared the Senate Banking Committee, providing clearer regulatory framework for digital assets.
